name: GRID_Ours (Task-bank)
headline_note: Primary GRID system: Task-bank Reward. Best source-averaged recall (64.91%) and competitive Avg F1 (68.53%).

name: GRID_Ours (End2End)
headline_note: Secondary GRID system: End2End Reward. Avg F1 58.06%, higher online judge cost than Task-bank.

name: CTINexus
headline_note: Near-tied best Avg F1, but lower recall and higher multi-step inference cost than GRID_Ours.

name: LLM-CAKG
headline_note: Strong precision and competitive Avg F1, but still below Task-bank Reward.

name: Cognee
headline_note: Moderate recall but clearly below the top GRID_Ours and CTINexus systems.

name: CTIKG
family: prior CTI knowledge graph extraction baseline
headline_note: High precision but much lower recall than the main GRID_Ours systems.

name: Graphiti
headline_note: Recall and Avg F1 fall far below the stronger CTI-specialized methods.

name: GraphRAG
headline_note: Highest average precision in the table, but recall collapse drives low Avg F1.

name: AttacKG+
headline_note: Low source-averaged precision, recall, and Avg F1 in the unified benchmark.

name: KnowGL
headline_note: Only retained non-LLM baseline in the main table, with very low recall and Avg F1.
